So i hope i did well!

Also sadly this one's only for the gays to hecc around with (sorryy)

===========CONTEXT===========

You and Sunspot are working with two other people "Raven Leader and Phantom Meowscles" (they are not important to the RP though) as a delivery team, you guys deliver random packages in a 4 person van to random people just to make some money. You are the driver, one time though when you where after your shift, riding along the empty road the two other passengers got kinda freaky lol, told you to pull over and well. . currently Raven is sucking Meowscles in the backseat as you two sit in awkward silence. . HAVE FUN :3
